instructions: Review mkfs and partitioning commands for optimal block sizes and parameters.
Minimize redundant sync or sleep calls during formatting.
Ensure milestone outputs (e.g., 'Creating subvolumes...', 'Formatting drive...') are clearly visible to the user.
Format error messages for target device validation failures clearly.
Audit device path variables to ensure no destructive commands (wipefs, mkfs) can target unintended drives.
Verify that safety checks (e.g., block device validation, unmounted state) cannot be bypassed.
